ddl.where: "graph_id" IS NULL AND "team_id" IS NULL AND "hidden" = false
ddl.name: graphs_visible_root_organization_name_idx

ddl.where: "active" = true AND "valid_until" IS NULL AND "entity_id" IS NOT NULL
ddl.name: sources_entity_current_id_idx

ddl.where: "active" = true AND "valid_until" IS NULL AND "relationship_id" IS NOT NULL
ddl.name: sources_relationship_current_id_idx

ddl.value:
(
                    "scope" = 'graph'
                    AND "project_id" IS NOT NULL
                    AND "team_id" IS NULL
                )
                OR
                (
                    "scope" = 'team'
                    AND "project_id" IS NULL
                    AND "team_id" IS NOT NULL
                )
ddl.name: chats_scope_target_check

ddl.value:
(
                ("subject_kind" = 'user' and "subject_user_id" is not null and "subject_team_id" is null and "subject_organization_id" is null)
                or ("subject_kind" = 'team' and "subject_user_id" is null and "subject_team_id" is not null and "subject_organization_id" is null)
                or ("subject_kind" = 'organization' and "subject_user_id" is null and "subject_team_id" is null and "subject_organization_id" is not null)
            )
ddl.name: connector_installations_subject_scope_check

ddl.value:
(
                    "storage_kind" = 'internal'
                    AND "external_url" IS NULL
                    AND "external_provider" IS NULL
                )
                OR (
                    "storage_kind" = 'external'
                    AND "external_url" IS NOT NULL
                    AND "external_provider" IS NOT NULL
                )
ddl.name: files_storage_origin_check

ddl.value: ((("organization_id" IS NOT NULL)::int + ("user_id" IS NOT NULL)::int + ("graph_id" IS NOT NULL)::int) = 1)
ddl.name: graphs_single_owner_check

ddl.value: "team_id" IS NULL OR "organization_id" IS NOT NULL
ddl.name: graphs_team_requires_organization_check

ddl.value: (("start_page" IS NULL AND "end_page" IS NULL) OR ("start_page" IS NOT NULL AND "end_page" IS NOT NULL AND "start_page" >= 1 AND "end_page" >= "start_page"))
ddl.name: text_units_page_span_check

ddl.value:
(
                    "kind" = 'source_correction'
                    AND "source_id" IS NOT NULL
                    AND "entity_id" IS NULL
                )
                OR
                (
                    "kind" = 'entity_addition'
                    AND "source_id" IS NULL
                    AND "entity_id" IS NOT NULL
                )
ddl.name: graph_suggestions_target_check
